name: Jinzhou Cihang Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Jinzhou Cihang Group Co., Ltd. engages in the processing, production, and sale of gold jewelry products in China and internationally. It also offers financial leasing services; and operates a pawnshop. The company was formerly known as Gold Leaf Jewelry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jinzhou Cihang Group Co., Ltd. in March 2016. Jinzhou Cihang Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Yichun, China.
